title: cyperus derreilema subsp. deckenii
intro: Cyperus derreilema subsp. deckenii, also known as East African flat sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in various medicinal practices due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic properties. The plant is believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as diabetes, fever, and respiratory issues, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and hepatoprotective effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Cyperus derreilema subsp. deckenii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the leaves and rhizomes being used to make a tea or added to various herbal remedies.
